claims.quote: At Nemours Children's Hospital, Florida, we've built an academic facility dedicated to exceptional patient care, medical education, public policy and children's welfare.
claims.claimText: Orlando campus described as academic facility for medical education.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic academic-mission statement for the Orlando campus; no specific Tier 1 program detail.
claims.limitations: Marketing language; no offer, eligibility, or pathway.

claims.quote: Nemours provides an excellent benefits package focused on meeting the needs of our growing workforce. Our comprehensive benefits program is personalized to fulfill each physician's individual needs.
claims.claimText: Nemours advertises a comprehensive, personalized physician benefits package.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Benefits-for-physicians language is Tier 3 attending/career content.

claims.quote: 4th Year Medical Student RotationVisiting Medical Students
claims.claimText: Mentions a 4th Year Medical Student Rotation / Visiting Medical Students link, but on the Delaware Area GME page — not confirmed for Orlando campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Visiting medical student rotation is Tier 1 USCE, but page scope is Delaware Area, creating campus-applicability conflict for Orlando.
claims.limitations: No eligibility, application, cost, or duration details on this page; details would be on linked /education/gme/medstudents.html. Cannot promote without Orlando-campus proof.

claims.quote: We're pleased to offer a truly unique pediatric residency program that combines the leading pediatricians and surgical specialists of Nemours Children's Hospital, Delaware with the outstanding academics of Sidney Kimmel Medical College of Thomas Jefferson University (TJU).
claims.claimText: Pediatric residency program based at Nemours Children's Hospital, Delaware in partnership with Sidney Kimmel Medical College/TJU.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page is residency curriculum content — Tier 2 trainee lane.
claims.limitations: Program is Delaware-based; not Orlando campus.

claims.quote: The primary teaching hospital for the program is Nemours Children's Hospital, Delaware, located in Wilmington, Delaware. The other hospitals in the program are the Thomas Jefferson University Hospital, just 30 minutes away in Philadelphia, and the Christiana Hospital, located right nearby in Newark, Delaware.
claims.claimText: Primary teaching hospital is Nemours Children's Hospital, Delaware; other sites are Thomas Jefferson University Hospital and Christiana Hospital.
claims.limitations: Sites are Delaware/Philadelphia; no Orlando site listed.

claims.quote: We offer an "X+Y" curriculum set up in 6 + 2. This means that a resident will complete 6 weeks of rotations that vary between inpatient floors, neonatal intensive care units, pediatric intensive care units, emergency room, well-baby nursery, elective rotations and others.
claims.claimText: X+Y curriculum (6+2) structure for pediatric residency.

claims.quote: The primary teaching hospital for the program is Nemours Children's Hospital, Delaware, located in Wilmington, Delaware.
claims.claimText: Institution under review is Nemours Children's Hospital Orlando but page content describes the Delaware-based pediatric residency program; campus mismatch.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Tier 2 residency content but tied to a different campus than the target institution.
claims.limitations: Page does not describe Orlando campus residency.

claims.quote: Nemours Children's has worked closely with Wolfson Children's Hospital in Jacksonville for 30 years. And, in the coming months, we'll be expanding those ties with even more clinical services offered by Nemours Children's providers at Wolfson Children's.
claims.claimText: Nemours expanding 30-year partnership with Wolfson Children's Hospital in Jacksonville.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 missed the Wolfson Jacksonville partnership signal relevant to Florida career footprint.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Affiliation/expansion context for clinician deployment — Tier 3.

claims.quote: How do I apply for a position?Look for a job you’re interested in and complete an application.
claims.claimText: Apply via the Nemours Oracle Cloud careers job board (Jacksonville location filter), per FAQ instructions.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: How-to-apply instructions on a physician/APP/staff recruitment page (Tier 3).
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture the application-pathway concept; only contact emails and timing were extracted.

claims.quote: You'll need to gather a series of required screening and immunization documents and have your academic advisor certify that you have completed all steps outlined below.
claims.claimText: Students must gather required screening and immunization documents; academic advisor must certify all steps were completed.
claims.limitations: Allied-health PT/OT/SLP at Delaware campus; not physician USCE and not Orlando.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured eligibility about fieldwork prerequisite but missed the screening/immunization/advisor-certification requirement bundle.
